message:
fix: Add unique label generation API to prevent duplicate block labels

Phase 9 Fix 38: Scoped Label Generation

Add nextLabelId(), emitLabeledBlock(), and emitBreakLabel() APIs to
NativeCodegen for generating unique block labels.

Refactor hardcoded "blk:" patterns in string methods to use unique
labels, preventing "duplicate label" errors when methods are nested.

Files updated:
- src/codegen/native/main/core.zig - Add label generation API
- src/codegen/native/methods/string.zig - Fix 9 functions
- src/codegen/native/methods/string/validation.zig - Fix 10 functions
